ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "precinct" TEXT /* Precinct where the incident occurred */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., residence, highway) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the incident */,
  "crime_type" TEXT /* Type of crime reported */,
  "case_status" TEXT /* Current status of the case */,
  "disposition" TEXT /* Final disposition of the case */,
  "beat" INTEGER /* Beat number assigned to the incident */,
  "report_area" INTEGER /* Reporting area number */,
  "case_assigned_to" TEXT /* Officer assigned to the case */,
  "report_number" INTEGER /* Report number associated with the incident */,
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the victim of the incident */,
  "suspect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the suspect involved in the incident */,
  "offense_date_time" TEXT /* Precise date and time when the offense occurred */,
  "report_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the incident was reported */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident */,
  "evidence_collected" TEXT /* List of evidence collected during the investigation */,
  "witnesses" TEXT /* Names and contact information of witnesses */,
  "incident_photos" TEXT /* URLs or file paths to incident photos */,
  "incident_videos" TEXT /* URLs or file paths to incident videos */,
  "incident_audio" TEXT /* URLs or file paths to incident audio recordings */,
  "audit_trail" TEXT /* Log of all updates and changes to the incident record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_crime_type FOREIGN KEY ("crime_type") REFERENCES crime_types ("crime_description"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_case_status FOREIGN KEY ("case_status") REFERENCES case_statuses ("status_description"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_precinct FOREIGN KEY ("precinct") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_case_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("case_assigned_to") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the officer */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the officer (e.g., officer, detective) */,
  "precinct" TEXT /* Precinct the officer is assigned to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the officer */,
  "badge_number" TEXT /* Badge number of the officer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the officer */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the officer was hired */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the officer's supervisor */,
  "training_hours" INTEGER /* Total training hours completed by the officer */,
  "performance_rating" INTEGER /* Performance rating of the officer (e.g., on a scale of 1-10) */,
  "last_promotion_date" TEXT /* Date of the officer's last promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_officers_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the precinct */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the precinct */,
  "precinct_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the precinct */,
  "precinct_chief_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the precinct chief */,
  "area_coverage" TEXT /* Geographic area covered by the precinct */,
  "number_of_officers" INTEGER /* Number of officers assigned to the precinct */,
  "annual_budget" TEXT /* Annual budget allocated to the precinct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precincts_precinct_chief_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_chief_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case status */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the case status (e.g., Closed, Further Investigation) */,
  "status_color" TEXT /* Color code for the status (e.g., red for 'Open', green for 'Closed') */,
  "status_severity" INTEGER /* Severity level of the status (e.g., 1 for low, 5 for high) */,
  "status_last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_types" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime type */,
  "crime_description" TEXT /* Description of the crime type (e.g., Aggravated Assault, Burglary) */,
  "crime_severity" INTEGER /* Severity level of the crime (e.g., 1 for minor, 5 for major) */,
  "crime_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the crime in the jurisdiction */,
  "crime_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the crime on the community (e.g., 'High', 'Medium', 'Low') */,
  "crime_laws" TEXT /* Relevant laws and statutes related to the crime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id")
)
